implementation_summary: Added AddContactModal.tsx, modeled directly on InviteMemberModal.tsx: npub Input + NpubQrButton/NpubQrModal for scan + typed-error-code getErrorMessage switch ('invalid_npub'/'self'/'already_exists'/default -> generic) + success-timeout-then-close (~1500ms) pattern, calling the S1 addContactByNpub(npub, ownPubkeyHex) export (ownPubkeyHex from useNostrIdentity()). Submit is guarded against double-submission (isLoading disables both buttons; submit additionally disabled when input is empty or success is true). The success branch is a single shared code path for both reactivated:true and reactivated:false (no divergent branching) — calls onSuccess() unconditionally on result.ok before the timeout, so AC-UX-2 (new contact) and AC-UX-6 (reactivated archived contact) both refresh via the same mechanism. Wired pages/contacts.tsx's ContactListView with a useDisclosure(), an 'Add Contact' Button (data-testid=add-contact-btn) placed in a Flex alongside the existing heading block, and <AddContactModal> rendered as a JSX sibling whose onSuccess bumps the existing contactsRevision state (no new revision mechanism introduced — reuses the counter already bumped after rememberContactsFromGroups). Added all twelve new contacts.* i18n keys (en+de) plus reworded contacts.description and contacts.emptyBody (en+de) to mention npub-based adding, per spec Technical Approach. AddContactModal imports nothing from lib/contacts.ts beyond the addContactByNpub export (verified via grep — no readStoredContacts/writeStoredContacts/knownPeers reach from the component).

lint_typecheck.lint: NO_LINT (no ESLint config exists in app/; next lint prompts interactively and cannot run non-interactively — same baseline as S1, unchanged by this story)
lint_typecheck.typecheck: clean (npx tsc --noEmit from app/, 0 errors, unchanged from baseline)

judgment_calls.decision: Add Contact button placed in a Flex (justify=space-between, wrap=wrap) alongside the existing page heading/description Box, rather than as a full-width button below the description.
judgment_calls.rationale: Keeps the primary action visually anchored to the page header, consistent with the 'create-group-btn' placement pattern in pages/groups.tsx. No component-test precedent exists in this repo to assert layout, so this was a visual judgment call.
judgment_calls.residual_risk: At narrow viewports the Flex wraps the button to its own line (wrap=wrap) rather than clipping, but this was not visually verified on a real narrow viewport during implementation. Flagged as VQ-S2-015 (post-impl) for a manual check.

judgment_calls.decision: Kept handleAdd as a plain synchronous function (no async/await/void) since addContactByNpub (S1) is synchronous, unlike InviteMemberModal's async inviteByNpub — but preserved the try/catch/finally shape for defensive symmetry with InviteMemberModal's error handling.
judgment_calls.rationale: Matches the actual signature of the S1 seam contract; adding async/await around a sync call would be misleading dead ceremony.
judgment_calls.residual_risk: None — this is a straightforward simplification consistent with the real dependency's type.

judgment_calls.decision: Reused copy.contacts.addContactTitle as the QR sub-modal's title prop, instead of adding a 13th copy key or reusing copy.groups.qrScannerTitle.
judgment_calls.rationale: The spec's twelve-key list (AC-INTL-1) is exhaustive and does not include a scanner-specific title key for this feature; reusing the feature's own title keeps the QR flow correctly attributed to 'adding a contact' without inventing an out-of-scope key.
judgment_calls.residual_risk: Cosmetic only — InviteMemberModal uses a dedicated, more generic 'Scan QR Code' title for its own scanner sub-modal, so there's a minor inconsistency in title-reuse convention across the two modals. Flagged as VQ-S2-014 (post-impl); does not affect any AC.

judgment_calls.decision: German copy uses informal 'du' throughout (matching existing contacts.description tone: 'damit du direkt weiterschreiben kannst').
judgment_calls.rationale: Existing app-wide convention per exploration of i18n.ts's de object; consistency required across all new and reworded strings in this section.

gate_remediation.finding: Codex P2: manual-add knownPeers write not seen by live walled-garden subscribers (DM watcher, call watcher, ContactChat) until reload
gate_remediation.fix: MarmotContext knownPeersRevision counter + notifyKnownPeersChanged(); AddContactModal bumps on success; 3 watchers refresh knownPeersRef on the bump
